verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ በዐረበ ፡ ሞአብ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ኢየሪኮ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses to the west of Moab by Jordan near Jericho, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses in the plains of Moab by Jordan near Jericho, saying,

verses.geez:
አዝዞሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ከመ ፡ የሀብዎሙ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ዘይትዋረሱ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ አህጉረ ፡
                  ዘውስቴቶን ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ወአድያሚሆን ፡ ዘዐውዶን ፡ ለውእቶን ፡ አህጉር ፡ የሀብዎሙ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ።

translations.lxx: Give orders to the children of Israel, and they shall give to the Levites cities to dwell in from the lot of their possession, and they shall give to the Levites the suburbs of the cities round about them.
translations.kjv: Command the children of Israel, that they give unto the Levites of the inheritance of their possession cities to dwell in; and ye shall give also unto the Levites suburbs for the cities round about them.

verses.geez: ወይኩኖሙ ፡ አህጉረ ፡ እለ ፡ ውስቴቶን ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ፡ ይኩኖሙ ፡ ለላህሞሙ ፡ ወለእንስሳሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the cities shall be for them to dwell in, and their enclosures shall be for their cattle and all their beasts.
translations.kjv: And the cities shall they have to dwell in; and the suburbs of them shall be for their cattle, and for their goods, and for all their beasts.

verses.geez: ወደወሎን ፡ ለአህጉር ፡ እለ ፡ ትሁብዎሙ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ፡ እምነ ፡ ሀገሩ ፡ ትሜጥኑ ፡ በአፍአ ፡ እምዐውዱ ፤

translations.lxx: And the suburbs of the cities which ye shall give to the Levites, shall be from the wall of the city and outwards two thousand cubits round about.
translations.kjv: And the suburbs of the cities, which ye shall give unto the Levites, shall reach from the wall of the city and outward a thousand cubits round about.

verses.geez:
ዕሥራ ፡ ምእት ፡ በእመት ፡ እምዐረፍቱ ፡ ጽባሓዊ ፡ ለሀገር ፡ ወ፳፻በእመት ፡ እምገቦሁ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ አዜብ ፡
                  ወ፳፻[በእመት ፡] እምገቦሁ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ወ፳፻በእመት ፡ እምገቦሁ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ መስዕ ፡ ወሀገሩ ፡ ማእከለ ፡
                  ዝንቱ ፡ ትኩንክሙ ፡ ወዘአምሳለ ፡ አህጉሮንሂ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt measure outside the city on the east side two thousand cubits, and on the south side two thousand cubits, and on the west side two thousand cubits, and on the north side two thousand cubits; and your city shall be in the midst of this, and the suburbs of the cities as described.
translations.kjv: And ye shall measure from without the city on the east side two thousand cubits, and on the south side two thousand cubits, and on the west side two thousand cubits, and on the north side two thousand cubits; and the city shall be in the midst: this shall be to them the suburbs of the cities.

verses.geez:
ትሁብዎሙ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ፡ ስሱ ፡ አህጉረ ፡ ዘምስካይ ፡ ዘትፈልጡ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይኩኖ ፡ ምስካይ ፡ ህየ ፡ ለቀታሊ ፡
                  ወዘእንበለ ፡ እላንቱ ፡ ዘትሁብዎሙ ፡ ባዕደ ፡ አህጉረ ፡ አርብዓ ፡ ወክልኤ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall give the cities to the Levites, the six cities of refuge which ye shall give for the slayer to flee thither, and in addition to these, forty-two cities.
translations.kjv: And among the cities which ye shall give unto the Levites there shall be six cities for refuge, which ye shall appoint for the manslayer, that he may flee thither: and to them ye shall add forty and two cities.

verses.geez:
ይከውን ፡ ኵሉ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ዘትሁብዎሙ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ፡ አርብዓ ፡ ወሰማኒ ፡ ወለእላንቱሂ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ምስለ ፡
                  አድያሚሆን ።

translations.lxx: Ye shall give to the Levites in all forty-eight cities, them and their suburbs.
translations.kjv: So all the cities which ye shall give to the Levites shall be forty and eight cities: them shall ye give with their suburbs.

verses.geez:
ወአህጉር ፡ ዘትሁብዎሙ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ዘብ[ዙ] ኅ ፡ ብዙኅ ፡ ወእምውስተ
                  ፡ ዘውሑድ ፡ ውሑድ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ርስቶሙ ፡ ዘተከፍሉ ፡ ዘዘ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ የሀብዎሙ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ርስቶሙ ፡
                  ለሌዋውያን ፡ አህጉረ ።

translations.lxx: And as for the cities which ye shall give out of the possession of the children of Israel, from those that have much ye shall give much, and from those that have less ye shall give less: they shall give of their cities to the Levites each one according to his inheritance which they shall inherit.
translations.kjv: And the cities which ye shall give shall be of the possession of the children of Israel: from them that have many ye shall give many; but from them that have few ye shall give few: every one shall give of his cities unto the Levites according to his inheritance which he inheriteth.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez: ንግሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወበሎሙ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ተዐድዉ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ከናአን ።

translations.lxx: Speak to the children of Israel, and thou shalt say to them, Ye are to cross over Jordan into the land of Chanaan.
translations.kjv: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, When ye be come over Jordan into the land of Canaan;

verses.geez:
ወፍልጡ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ አህጉረ ፡ ምስካይ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይኩንክሙ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ይሰኪ ፡ ህየ ፡ ቀታሊ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘቀተለ ፡ ነፍሰ ፡
                  በኢያእምሮ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall appoint to yourselves cities: they shall be to you cities of refuge for the slayer to flee to, every one who has killed another unintentionally.
translations.kjv: Then ye shall appoint you cities to be cities of refuge for you; that the slayer may flee thither, which killeth any person at unawares.

verses.geez:
ወይኩናክሙ ፡ ውእቶን ፡ አህጉር ፡ ምስካየ ፡ እምነ ፡ አበ ፡ ደም ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይሙት ፡ ቀታሊ ፡ እስከ ፡ ይቀውም ፡
                  ቅድመ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ወይትሐተት ።

translations.lxx: And the cities shall be to you places of refuge from the avenger of blood, and the slayer shall not die until he stands before the congregation for judgment.
translations.kjv: And they shall be unto you cities for refuge from the avenger; that the manslayer die not, until he stand before the congregation in judgment.

verses.geez: ወውእቶን ፡ አህጉር ፡ እለ ፡ ትሁቡ ፡ ስሱ ፡ አህጉረ ፡ ምስካይ ፡ ይኩናክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the cities which ye shall assign, even the six cities, shall be places of refuge for you.
translations.kjv: And of these cities which ye shall give six cities shall ye have for refuge.

verses.geez: ሠላሰ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ትፈልጡ ፡ በማዕዶተ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ወሠላሰ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ትፈልጡ ፡ በምድረ ፡ ከናአን ።

translations.lxx: Ye shall assign three cities on the other side of Jordan, and ye shall assign three cities in the land of Chanaan.
translations.kjv: Ye shall give three cities on this side Jordan, and three cities shall ye give in the land of Canaan, which shall be cities of refuge.

verses.geez: ምስካይ ፡ ይኩኖሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ለግዩርኒ ፡ ወለፈላሲኒ ፡ ዘሀለወ ፡ ኀቤክሙ ፤

translations.lxx: It shall be a place of refuge for the children of Israel, and for the stranger, and for him that sojourns among you; these cities shall be for a place of refuge, for every one to flee thither who has killed a man unintentionally.
translations.kjv: These six cities shall be a refuge, both for the children of Israel, and for the stranger, and for the sojourner among them: that every one that killeth any person unawares may flee thither.

verses.geez: ይኩኖሙ ፡ ምስካየ ፡ እላንቱ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ከመ ፡ ይስኪ ፡ ህየ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘቀተለ ፡ መንፈሰ ፡ በኢያእምሮ ።

translations.lxx: And if he should smite him with an iron instrument, and the man should die, he is a murderer; let the murderer by all means be put to death.
translations.kjv: And if he smite him with an instrument of iron, so that he die, he is a murderer: the murderer shall surely be put to death.

verses.geez: ወእመሰ ፡ በንዋየ ፡ ሐፂን ፡ ዘበጦ ፡ ወሞተ ፡ ቀታሊ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሞተ ፡ ለይሙት ፡ ዘቀተለ ።

translations.lxx: And if he should smite him with a stone thrown from his hand, whereby a man may die, and he thus die, he is a murderer; let the murderer by all means be put to death.
translations.kjv: And if he smite him with throwing a stone, wherewith he may die, and he die, he is a murderer: the murderer shall surely be put to death.

verses.geez:
ወለእመኒ ፡ በእብን ፡ ወገሮ ፡ አው ፡ አውደቀ ፡ ላዕሌሁ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ወሞተ ፡ ቀታሊ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሞተ ፡
                  ለይሙት ፡ ዘቀተለ ።

translations.lxx: And if he should smite him with an instrument of wood from his hand, whereby he may die, and he thus die, he is a murderer; let the murderer by all means be put to death.
translations.kjv: Or if he smite him with an hand weapon of wood, wherewith he may die, and he die, he is a murderer: the murderer shall surely be put to death.

verses.geez:
ወለእመኒ ፡ በንዋየ ፡ ዕፅ ፡ ዘበጦ ፡ ወሞተ ፡ አው ፡ አውደቀ ፡ ላዕሌሁ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ወሞተ ፡ ቀታሊ ፡
                  ውእቱ ፡ ሞተ ፡ ለይሙት ፡ ዘቀተለ ።

translations.lxx: The avenger of blood himself shall slay the murderer: whensoever he shall meet him he shall slay him.
translations.kjv: The revenger of blood himself shall slay the murderer: when he meeteth him, he shall slay him.

verses.geez: ወአበ ፡ ደም ፡ ለሊሁ ፡ ይቅትሎ ።

translations.lxx: And if he should thrust him through enmity, or cast any thing upon him from an ambuscade, and the man should die,
translations.kjv: But if he thrust him of hatred, or hurl at him by laying of wait, that he die;

verses.geez: ወእመኒ ፡ ጸልኦ ፡ ይጸልኦ ፡ ወአውደቀ ፡ ላዕሌሁ ፡ ዘኮነ ፡ ንዋየ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይፀንሖ ፡ ወሞተ ፤

translations.lxx: or if he have smitten him with his hand through anger, and the man should die, let the man that smote him be put to death by all means, he is a murderer: let the murderer by all means be put to death: the avenger of blood shall slay the murderer when he meets him.
translations.kjv: Or in enmity smite him with his hand, that he die: he that smote him shall surely be put to death; for he is a murderer: the revenger of blood shall slay the murderer, when he meeteth him.

verses.geez:
ቀታሊ ፡ [ውእቱ ፡] ይቅትልዎ ፡ ለዘባጢ ፡ እስመ ፡ ቀታሊ ፡ ውእቱ ፤ ሞተ ፡ ለይሙት ፡ ዘቀተለ ፡ ወአበ ፡ ደም ፡
                  ለይቅትሎ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ረከቦ ።

translations.lxx: But if he should thrust him suddenly, not through enmity, or cast any thing upon him, not from an ambuscade,
translations.kjv: But if he thrust him suddenly without enmity, or have cast upon him any thing without laying of wait,

verses.geez: ወእመሰ ፡ ግብት ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ኢይጸልእ ፡ ወአውደቀ ፡ ላዕሌሁ ፡ ዘኮነ ፡ ንዋየ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ኢይጸንሖ ፤

translations.lxx: or smite him with any stone, whereby a man may die, unawares, and it should fall upon him, and he should die, but he was not his enemy, nor sought to hurt him;
translations.kjv: Or with any stone, wherewith a man may die, seeing him not, and cast it upon him, that he die, and was not his enemy, neither sought his harm:

verses.geez:
አው ፡ በዘ ፡ ኮነ ፡ እብን ፡ ወሞተ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ ወቀተሎ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ኢያአምር ፡ ወኢኮነ ፡ ጸላኢሁ ፡ ወኢይፈቅድ ፡
                  ያሕስም ፡ ላዕሌሁ ፤

translations.lxx: then the assembly shall judge between the smiter and the avenger of blood, according to these judgments.
translations.kjv: Then the congregation shall judge between the slayer and the revenger of blood according to these judgments:

verses.geez: ወይሕትቱ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ቀታሊ ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ አበ ፡ ደም ፡ በከመ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ፍትሕ ።

translations.lxx: And the congregation shall rescue the slayer from the avenger of blood, and the congregation shall restore him to his city of refuge, whither he fled for refuge; and he shall dwell there till the death of the high-priest, whom they anointed with the holy oil.
translations.kjv: And the congregation shall deliver the slayer out of the hand of the revenger of blood, and the congregation shall restore him to the city of his refuge, whither he was fled: and he shall abide in it unto the death of the high priest, which was anointed with the holy oil.

verses.geez:
ወያድኅንዎ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ለዘ ፡ ቀተለ ፡ እምነ ፡ አበ ፡ ደም ፡ ወይወስድዎ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ ምስካይ ፡
                  ኀበ ፡ ይሰኪ ፡ ወይነብር ፡ ህየ ፡ እስከ ፡ ይመውት ፡ ካህን ፡ ዐቢይ ፡ ዘቀብእዎ ፡ በቅብአ ፡ ቅድሳት ።

translations.lxx: But if the slayer should in any wise go out beyond the bounds of the city whither he fled for refuge,
translations.kjv: But if the slayer shall at any time come without the border of the city of his refuge, whither he was fled;

verses.geez: ወለእመሰ ፡ ወፅአ ፡ አፍአ ፡ ቀታሊ ፡ ውእተ ፡ አድዋለ ፡ ሀገር ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ሰከየ ፡ ህየ ፤

translations.lxx: and the avenger of blood should find him without the bounds of the city of his refuge, and the avenger of blood should kill the slayer, he is not guilty.
translations.kjv: And the revenger of blood find him without the borders of the city of his refuge, and the revenger of blood kill the slayer; he shall not be guilty of blood:

verses.geez:
ወረከቦ ፡ አበ ፡ ደም ፡ በአፍአ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አድዋለ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ ምስካዩ ፡ ወቀተሎ ፡ አበ ፡ ደም ፡ ለቀታሊ ፡ አልቦ ፡
                  ጌጋየ ።

translations.lxx: For he ought to have remained in the city of refuge till the high-priest died; and after the death of the high-priest the slayer shall return to the land of his possession.
translations.kjv: Because he should have remained in the city of his refuge until the death of the high priest: but after the death of the high priest the slayer shall return into the land of his possession.

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ ምስካዩ ፡ ይነብር ፡ አስከ ፡ ይመውት ፡ ካህን ፡ ዐቢይ ፡ ወእምድኅረ ፡ ሞተ ፡ ካህን ፡
                  ዐቢይ ፡ ይገብእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ብሔሩ ፡ ወከመዝ ፡ ይኩንክሙ ፡ ፍትሐ ፡ ኵነኔ ፡ በመዋዕሊክሙ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ በሓውርቲክሙ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And these things shall be to you for an ordinance of judgment throughout your generations in all your dwellings.
translations.kjv: So these things shall be for a statute of judgment unto you throughout your generations in all your dwellings.

verses.geez:
ኵሉ ፡ ዘቀተለ ፡ መንፈሰ ፡ ወዘለፎ ፡ ማኅተት ፡ ቅትልዎ ፡ ለቀታሊ ፡ ወስምዕ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ኢይከውን ፡ ማሕተተ ፡
                  ለአቅትሎ ፡ መንፈስ ።

translations.lxx: Whoever kills a man, thou shalt slay the murderer on the testimony of witnesses; and one witness shall not testify against a soul that he should die.
translations.kjv: Whoso killeth any person, the murderer shall be put to death by the mouth of witnesses: but one witness shall not testify against any person to cause him to die.

verses.geez: ወኢትንሥኡ ፡ ቤዛ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ቀታሊ ፡ ዘጌጋዩ ፡ ለመዊት ፡ ሞተ ፡ ለይሙት ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall not accept ransoms for life from a murderer who is worthy of death, for he shall be surely put to death.
translations.kjv: Moreover ye shall take no satisfaction for the life of a murderer, which is guilty of death: but he shall be surely put to death.

verses.geez:
ወኢትንሥኡ ፡ ቤዛ ፡ ከመ ፡ ታጕይይዎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ ምስካይ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይንበር ፡ ካዕበ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እስከ
                  ፡ ይመውት ፡ ካህን ፡ ዐቢይ ።

translations.lxx: Ye shall not accept a ransom to excuse his fleeing to the city of refuge, so that he should again dwell in the land, until the death of the high-priest.
translations.kjv: And ye shall take no satisfaction for him that is fled to the city of his refuge, that he should come again to dwell in the land, until the death of the priest.

verses.geez:
ወኢትግበርዋ ፡ ቀታሊተ ፡ ለምድርክሙ ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ትነብሩ ፡ እስመ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ደም ፡ ዘይሬስያ ፡ ቀታሊተ ፡
                  ለምድር ፡ ወኢትሰሪ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ምድር ፡ ለዘ ፡ ከዐወ ፡ ደመ ፡ ላዕሌሃ ።

translations.lxx: So shall ye not pollute with murder the land in which ye dwell; for this blood pollutes the land, and the land shall not be purged from the blood shed upon it, but by the blood of him that shed it.
translations.kjv: So ye shall not pollute the land wherein ye are: for blood it defileth the land: and the land cannot be cleansed of the blood that is shed therein, but by the blood of him that shed it.

verses.geez:
ወኢትገምንዋ ፡ ለምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ትነብሩ ፡ ወእንተ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ አነ ፡ አኀድር ፡ ምስሌክሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ አነ
                  ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘየኀድር ፡ ማእከሎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall not defile the land whereon ye dwell, on which I dwell in the midst of you; for I am the Lord dwelling in the midst of the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: Defile not therefore the land which ye shall inhabit, wherein I dwell: for I the LORD dwell among the children of Israel.
